title: Refactor DIP-022 (DIP): Direct instantiation of concrete TextBuffer implementations.

detected_issue.description: Direct instantiation of concrete TextBuffer implementations.
detected_issue.reasoning: The constructTextBuffer and constructReadConstrainedTextBuffer methods directly instantiate TextBuffer and ReadConstrainedTextBuffer. This prevents the inversion of control where alternative buffer strategies could be injected into the context.

fix_logic.summary: Introduce a TextBufferFactory to decouple IOContext from concrete TextBuffer implementations.
fix_logic.rationale: The IOContext class was directly instantiating TextBuffer and ReadConstrainedTextBuffer. By introducing a factory interface and a default implementation, we allow the creation logic to be abstracted, adhering to the Dependency Inversion Principle.
